daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Low Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-40
top_events.description: A routine launch of SpaceX's Starlink satellites for global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for a glimpse of the launch.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-18
top_events.description: Another batch of Starlink satellites to enhance internet services.
top_events.action: Catch the live stream to see the deployment.

top_events.title: KAIROS | Flight 3
top_events.description: Test flight of the KAIROS vehicle carrying small satellites.
top_events.action: Follow the webcast for updates on the test flight.
